name: cursor-cli-fable-design-and-implement-review-loop
title: cursor-cli-fable-design-and-implement-review-loop
description: Cursor CLI workflow variant for explicit Claude Fable 5 review runs. It uses Claude Fable 5 for review agent steps, Composer 2.5 for implementation, and Claude Opus 4.8 for design and all other agent steps.
